evals.prompt: I want to see what crypto cards are available that don't require KYC, sorted by rating
evals.expected_output: Runs: bun run src/cli.ts cards list --skip-kyc --sort general

evals.prompt: Compare the Bit2Go card and the MiPay card for me, I want to see which has lower fees
evals.expected_output: Runs: bun run src/cli.ts cards compare 23 39

evals.prompt: I need to log into payall with my wallet and then check my card balances
evals.expected_output: Runs auth login first, then cards my. Two sequential commands: bun run src/cli.ts auth login, then bun run src/cli.ts cards my

evals.prompt: Show my wallet balances across all chains
evals.expected_output: Runs: payall wallet balance — displays USDT and gas token balances on BSC, ETH, and TRON

evals.prompt: Top up my card and auto-pay from my wallet on BSC
evals.expected_output: Sequential: 1) payall cards my to find binding_id, 2) payall cards topup <binding_id> --amount <amount> --chain bsc --yes to get deposit address, 3) payall wallet send --to <deposit_addr> --amount <amount> --chain bsc --yes to send USDT on-chain
